people.name: Lawrence M. Stolurow
people.currentAffiliation: Professor Emeritus, University of Iowa (1918–2009)

sources.label: La Jolla Light obituary, 2009 (sole source for education facts)
Merrill interview — Stolurow's Illinois Training Research Lab & SOCRATES CAI
Univ. of Illinois Archives finding aid (Illinois period records)
Triandis & Brennan (2010), American Psychologist memorial — PhD Pittsburgh 1947 + dissertation title
Stolurow (1948) JCPP — reference list cites the 1947 dissertation (title corroboration)

people.notes: Education facts now verified by two independent sources (family obituary + American Psychologist memorial). Career: Illinois Training Research Lab 1953–66 (SOCRATES CAI), Harvard CAI Lab 1966–71, SUNY Stony Brook, Iowa. His own doctoral advisor remains undocumented — the chain's dead end; the 1947 dissertation's acknowledgments page at Univ. of Pittsburgh Archives is the best remaining lead. No photo found in any acceptable source (pre-web era).
